message: [typescript-best-practices] Never use 'any' type annotation → Let TypeScript infer, use 'unknown' with type guards, or use a proper type definition
[drizzle-best-practices] Using generic Error instead of TRPCError in router loses structured error handling → Use throw new TRPCError({ code: 'NOT_FOUND', message: '...' })
[next-best-practices] Inline script missing id attribute → Add id for Next.js to track it: <script id="..." dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ ... }} />
